phoneticUs: 藢bl忙sto蕣ma瑟藞ko蕣s瑟s; 藢bl忙st蓹ma瑟藞ko蕣s瑟s
examples: The FDA also has received reports of cases of coccidioidomycosis and blastomycosis, including deaths, in patients treated with TNF blockers.
It may also be seen in tuberculosis, sarcoidosis, histoplasmosis, coccidioidomycosis, blastomycosis, ulcerative colitis, and with use of some medications.
